python3 <<'PY'
import struct
MAX=256
d=open('enc.db','rb').read()
uc=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,0)[0]
ue=4+uc*(MAX+16+32)
fc=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,ue)[0]
o=ue+4
recs=[]
for _ in range(fc):
 u=d[o:o+MAX]; o+=MAX
 f=d[o:o+MAX]; o+=MAX
 iv=d[o:o+16]; o+=16
 tg=d[o:o+16]; o+=16
 el=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,o)[0]; o+=4
 ct=d[o:o+el]; o+=el
 recs.append((u,f,iv,tg,el,ct))
out=bytearray(struct.pack('<i',uc)+d[4:ue]+struct.pack('<i',fc))
for u,f,iv,tg,el,ct in recs:
 if u.split(b'\0')[0]==b'user1' and f.split(b'\0')[0]==b'file1': el=0; ct=b''
 out+=u+f+iv+tg+struct.pack('<i',el)+ct
open('enc.db','wb').write(out)
PY
